fast_learner_auto_disabled.title: Fast learner auto-disabled
fast_learner_auto_disabled.description: The fast (intraday) learner lost to pure physics for seven days in a row and was automatically disabled to protect the forecast. To re-enable it, toggle "Fast learner (intraday correction)" off and then on again in the integration options.

slow_learner_auto_disabled.title: Shademap learner auto-disabled
slow_learner_auto_disabled.description: The shademap (slow) learner lost to pure physics for seven days in a row and was automatically disabled to protect the forecast. To re-enable it, toggle "Shademap learner (per-channel shade map)" off and then on again in the integration options.

get_forecast.name: Get forecast
get_forecast.description: Return the current 15-minute and hourly forecast curves for one or all configured sites. When quantile bands are enabled and trained, the response also carries total P10/P50/P90 15-minute and hourly curves.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Restrict the response to a single config entry. Omit to return every configured site.

import_bootstrap.name: Import learner bootstrap
import_bootstrap.description: Ingest a bootstrap JSON produced offline by the backfill script to pre-seed the day-ahead bias and shademap learner states. The payload is validated and clamped; an unknown schema version is rejected.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

payload.name: Bootstrap JSON
payload.description: The bootstrap object inline, as a JSON object or a JSON string. Provide this or a path, not both.

path.name: Bootstrap file path
path.description: Absolute path to a bootstrap JSON file inside an allowed directory (e.g. /config). Provide this or the payload, not both.

dump_shademap.name: Dump shademap
dump_shademap.description: Return the learned shademap as a polar table (sun azimuth x elevation) per channel, for visual comparison against known obstructions.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Restrict the dump to a single config entry. Omit to return every configured site.

rollback_learners.name: Roll back learner state
rollback_learners.description: Restore the day-ahead bias and shademap learner states from the nightly rollback ring. Enable switches and drift auto-disable flags stay untouched.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

snapshots_back.name: Snapshots back
snapshots_back.description: How many nightly snapshots to go back. 1 restores the newest snapshot (last night's pre-training state).

install_dashboard.name: Install observability dashboard
install_dashboard.description: Write the full observability dashboard, wired to this install's real entity ids, into a dashboard you created empty in the UI (Settings → Dashboards → Add dashboard, URL "balcony-solar"). Re-run any time to refresh it after an update.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

dashboard.name: Dashboard URL
dashboard.description: URL path of the empty storage-mode dashboard to write into (the value in its URL field, which must contain a hyphen).

overwrite.name: Overwrite existing content
overwrite.description: Replace a dashboard that already has content this integration did not create. A dashboard this action previously wrote is refreshed without it.

suggest_shade_groups.name: Suggest shade groups
suggest_shade_groups.description: Compare every module's individually-learned shade map bin-by-bin and suggest which planes share the same shading, so grouping is data-driven instead of eyeballed. Returns a similarity matrix, a grouping proposal and the current grouping for comparison.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

max_diff.name: Max mean tau difference
max_diff.description: Two planes count as sharing shade when their n-weighted mean transmittance difference over the bins both learned stays at or below this value. Lower is stricter.

min_common_bins.name: Minimum common bins
min_common_bins.description: Minimum number of shared sun-position bins two planes must both have learned before their similarity counts as evidence; below it the pair is insufficient and never grouped.

get_shade_profile.name: Get shade profile
get_shade_profile.description: Return the sun-path and learned-shade curve arrays for one module on one local date, without changing the live diagram selection. Used by the shade-profile card's comparison-date overlay.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

module.name: Module
module.description: The module/plane to profile. Omit to use the diagram's currently selected module.

date.name: Date
date.description: The local date to visualise, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD. Omit to use the diagram's currently selected date.

get_issued_forecast.name: Get issued forecast
get_issued_forecast.description: Return the day-ahead forecast as it was issued for one past local date, read from the 90-day issued ring (the frozen stand, no hindsight). Used by the power-history card's dashed forecast line on past days.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Target config entry. Omit only if a single site is configured.

date.name: Date
date.description: The local date whose issued forecast to return, ISO format YYYY-MM-DD.

user.title: Set up Balcony Solar Forecast
user.description: Set the name, location and update intervals. The "Site configuration" field is pre-filled with the full operator setup (8 modules, horizon tables, inverter groups) — just confirm it for the reference site, or edit it freely. Azimuth: 0° = North, clockwise (90° = East, 180° = South). Tilt: degrees from horizontal (90° = vertical). Optional per plane: a "shade_group" — planes that share the same obstruction (building edge, tree line) learn one shared shade map when given the same group. A plane may also set a "ross_coeff" to override the mounting-dependent Ross cell-temperature coefficient (~0.02 free-standing to ~0.056 facade-parallel).

data_description.name: Unique name for this installation — one instance per name.
data_description.fetch_interval_seconds: How often Open-Meteo is polled (default 1800 = 30 min).
data_description.recompute_interval_seconds: How often the forecast is recomputed (default 900 = 15 min).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Balcony Solar Forecast
reconfigure.description: Edit the structural setup: location, update intervals and the full site configuration (planes, horizon tables, inverter groups). The runtime tunables — learner switches, quantile bands and comparison sensors — live in the options dialog ("Configure"). The name is immutable after setup. Azimuth: 0° = North, clockwise (90° = East, 180° = South). Tilt: degrees from horizontal (90° = vertical). Optional per plane: a "shade_group" — planes that share the same obstruction (building edge, tree line) learn one shared shade map when given the same group. A plane may also set a "ross_coeff" to override the mounting-dependent Ross cell-temperature coefficient (~0.02 free-standing to ~0.056 facade-parallel).

data_description.fetch_interval_seconds: How often Open-Meteo is polled (default 1800 = 30 min).
data_description.recompute_interval_seconds: How often the forecast is recomputed (default 900 = 15 min).

error.site_not_object: The site configuration must be an object.
error.site_malformed: The site configuration is invalid or incomplete.
error.no_planes: At least one plane must be defined.
error.bad_azimuth: Azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees (0 = North).
error.bad_tilt: Tilt must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.bad_wp: Module power (Wp) must be greater than 0.
error.bad_ross_coeff: The Ross coefficient must be a finite number between 0.005 and 0.12.
error.bad_horizon_azimuth: Horizon azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees.
error.bad_horizon_elevation: Horizon elevation must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.seasonal_missing_tau: Seasonal horizon rows need tau_leafed and tau_bare.
error.group_no_name: Every inverter group needs a name.
error.group_no_planes: Every group must contain at least one plane.
error.group_unknown_plane: A group references an unknown plane.
error.bad_ac_limit: The AC limit must be greater than 0.
error.shade_group_empty: A shade group must be a non-empty name.
error.shade_group_collision: A shade group must not equal the name of a plane that is not itself in that group.

abort.already_configured: An installation with this name already exists.

init.title: Balcony Solar Forecast options
init.description: Runtime tunables only — to edit the location, planes, horizon or inverter groups, use 'Reconfigure' in the integration entry's three-dot menu. Runtime tunables only: the learner layers, quantile bands and comparison sensors. Structural setup (location, intervals, the full site configuration) moved to "Reconfigure" in the integration's three-dot menu.

data_description.fast_learner_enabled: Applies a short-lived intraday clear-sky-index correction to the next few hours (recovers from fog mornings).
data_description.slow_learner_enabled: Learns per-channel beam transmittance by sun position over a season (shade, trees, building edge).
data_description.day_ahead_bias_enabled: Applies a nightly-trained multiplicative bias per cloud class and day part.
data_description.quantiles_enabled: Emits empirical P10/P50/P90 uncertainty bands from the 90-day error ring (collapses to P50 until a bin has enough samples).
data_description.comparison_sensors: List of external daily-kWh forecast sensors the scoreboard scores the engine against. Each row has a name plus a daily_entity. Ships empty; e.g. name "8-Entry Baseline" -> sensor.pv_prognose_heute_alle_module.

error.site_not_object: The site configuration must be an object.
error.site_malformed: The site configuration is invalid or incomplete.
error.no_planes: At least one plane must be defined.
error.bad_azimuth: Azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees (0 = North).
error.bad_tilt: Tilt must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.bad_wp: Module power (Wp) must be greater than 0.
error.bad_ross_coeff: The Ross coefficient must be a finite number between 0.005 and 0.12.
error.bad_horizon_azimuth: Horizon azimuth must be between 0 and 360 degrees.
error.bad_horizon_elevation: Horizon elevation must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
error.seasonal_missing_tau: Seasonal horizon rows need tau_leafed and tau_bare.
error.group_no_name: Every inverter group needs a name.
error.group_no_planes: Every group must contain at least one plane.
error.group_unknown_plane: A group references an unknown plane.
error.bad_ac_limit: The AC limit must be greater than 0.
error.shade_group_empty: A shade group must be a non-empty name.
error.shade_group_collision: A shade group must not equal the name of a plane that is not itself in that group.
